name: Absolute
scoreReason: No website at all — perfect greenfield opportunity for modern build with online booking.
painPoints: No online presence forcing clients to call for appointments; no service menu or pricing transparency online; losing bookings to studios with visible online availability.
pitch: Your 4.8 rating tells me you deliver brilliant results — but right now clients have to ring to book, which means missed calls and lost appointments. I built a quick walkthrough showing what a simple online booking site would do for you — worth 2 minutes?
linkedinMessage: Your 4.8 rating tells me you deliver brilliant results — but right now clients have to ring to book, which means missed calls and lost appointments. I built a quick walkthrough showing what a simple online booking site would do for you — worth 2 minutes?
loomBrief: Homepage showing empty Google search result for 'beauty salon near Beccles' with no Absolute listing | Show phone ringing unanswered during hours, potential client moving to competitor with visible online booking | Show mock Absolute site with service menu, live availability calendar, and mobile-optimized booking form.
followUp: Hey — just checking if you had a chance to see that walkthrough on your booking setup. Happy to chat about what's involved if you're interested.

name: About Face
scoreReason: No website at all — excellent 4.9 rating means high client satisfaction ready to be captured online.
painPoints: No online presence despite 4.9-star reputation; potential clients cannot book or even find service menu online; phone-dependent booking creates bottleneck.
pitch: Your 4.9 stars with 23 reviews is impressive — that's the kind of reputation that deserves to be findable online. Right now there's no site, so new clients can't book or even see what you offer. I put together a 2-minute walkthrough of what changing that could look like — keen to see it?
linkedinMessage: Your 4.9 stars with 23 reviews is impressive — that's the kind of reputation that deserves to be findable online. Right now there's no site, so new clients can't book or even see what you offer. I put together a 2-minute walkthrough of what changing that could look like — keen to see it?
loomBrief: Google search for 'beauty salon Pontypridd' showing no About Face listing or website result | Demonstrate a prospective client trying to check services/pricing and hitting dead end; show them attempting to book via phone with no availability visible | Mock About Face site with service gallery, pricing menu, instant online booking, and mobile-responsive design.
followUp: Checking in — did you get a chance to look at that 2-minute walkthrough I sent over?

name: Dermal Beauty Clinic
address: 12-14 Mount Pleasant, Wolverhampton, Bilston WV14 7LJ, UK
scoreReason: Existing decent site with no obvious booking friction or mobile issues — not a strong fit for outreach at this time.
painPoints: None identified — site functions adequately for current business needs.
pitch: Not a priority lead — site is performing adequately.
linkedinMessage: Not a priority lead — site is performing adequately.
